Name: EXAMPLE_EMAIL_SSRSATTACHMENT
Description:
EXAMPLE_EMAIL_SSRSATTACHMENT

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to send emails with SSRS Report attachments, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

Within the stored procedure Prescript_Example_SendEmailWithSsrsReport, the clr_SimpleEmail is employed to attach SSRS reports and dispatch an email.
Author: Josh
